description: Karaite partnership dissolution agreement between two men who had been running a shop (דכאן) together. Dated Sunday 22nd Nisan 5441 AM (1681 CE). The two partners are Yaʿaqov b. Yiṣḥaq al-Qudsī and Avraham b. ʿOvadya Feyrūz. The scribe Barūkh Rofe has signed along with two other witnesses, Yosef Qayīm and Avraham Feyrūz (as a consenting party).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
